Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const skin = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/general-detail-default.json'\)\); const slots = skin.slots; const keys = ['detail.header.fill', 'detail.header.frame', 'detail.header.bg', 'detail.summary.fill', 'detail.summary.frame', 'detail.footer.fill', 'detail.footer.frame', 'detail.footer.bleed', 'detail.content.bleed', 'detail.tabbar.rail.bleed']; keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k + ':', JSON.stringify\(slots[k]\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const layout=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('assets/resources/ui-spec/layouts/lobby-main-main.json'\)\); function find\(node,path,idx=0\){if\(idx===path.length\)return node;const c=\(node.children||[]\).find\(n=>n.id===path[idx]\);return c?find\(c,path,idx+1\):null;} const btn=find\(layout.root,'LobbyRoot/MainFrame/ContentArea/HeroTaskWallCard/DispatchBoardPeek/DispatchBoardActionButton'.split\('/'\),0\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(btn,null,2\)\)")
